response.justification: Exceptional match with 19 years of progressive full-stack experience and demonstrated expertise in the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React). Current role at re:cinq directly addresses the AI agent development requirement. While Nest.js and Vitest aren't explicitly mentioned, proven mastery of testing culture (TDD background), architecture design, and rapid skill acquisition across frameworks suggests quick onboarding. Strong communication skills demonstrated through workshops and mentoring.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript/Node.js/React expertise with recent hands-on experience across full-stack development
Current role directly addresses AI agent infrastructure and MCP development, perfectly aligned with emerging requirements
Demonstrated architecture and system design capability with strong TDD culture and testing expertise
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned in experience, though architecture understanding is clearly demonstrated
Vitest and Playwright testing frameworks not specifically called out despite evident strong testing culture
No explicit Python experience mentioned, one of the listed required proficiency languages

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and specific testing frameworks
